turns.user_message: My friend said I seem checked out lately. I just feel so drained all the time.
People keep asking if I'm okay, and I don't know what to say. This heavy feeling just won't go away.
I'm completely numb to everything people say to me now. I feel like I'm just an empty shell going through the motions.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something someone else said or did. This has been going on for a while.
